title: artemisia dracunculus var. redowskyi
intro: Artemisia dracunculus var. redowskyi, also known as Russian tarragon or red tarragon, is a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Russian tarragon include alleviating digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Russian tarragon can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in culinary dishes to add flavor and aroma.
